author: mokeyish
description: Allow code blocks to be executed interactively in a sandbox like Jupyter notebooks. Supported language Rust, Kotlin, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, etc.

manifest.author: YISH
manifest.description: An Obsidian plugin that allows code blocks to be executed interactively like in Jupyter Notebooks. Supports languages like Rust, Kotlin, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript etc.
manifest.name: Code Emitter

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* ✨ Add support for ascii-color by @mokeyish in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/pull/74
* 💚 Fix version-bump by @mokeyish in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/pull/78
* ✨ Add support for matplotlib by @mokeyish in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/pull/79


## Examples

### 1. matplotlib 

```python
import micropip
await micropip.install('matplotlib')

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

fig, ax = plt.subplots()             # Create a figure containing a single Axes.
ax.plot([1, 2, 3, 4], [1, 4, 2, 3])  # Plot some data on the Axes.
plt.show()                           # Show the figure.
```

### 2. ascii-color

```python
print("Hello from \x1B[1;3;31mxterm.js")
```

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/compare/0.2.1...0.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
*  ✨ Add support for HTML&CSS and running code in editing view
* ⬆️ Bump actions/setup-node from 3 to 4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/pull/29
* ⬆️ Bump actions/checkout from 3 to 4 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/pull/28
* ⬆️ Bump @types/node from 16.11.6 to 22.0.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/pull/60

## New Contributors
* @dependabot made their first contribution in https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/pull/29

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mokeyish/obsidian-code-emitter/compare/0.1.4...0.2.1
